result: If I could change the world in one way, I would cultivate a deep sense of empathy in every person. If everyone could truly understand and feel the experiences and emotions of others, it might lead to more compassion, justice, and collaboration. Much of the world's conflict and suffering arises from misunderstanding or indifference, so increasing empathy could fundamentally reshape society for the better.
